item.title: Immich vs PhotoPrism 2026 — Best Self-Hosted Photo Management Compared
item.description: Immich vs PhotoPrism in 2026: detailed comparison of features, Docker deployment, AI capabilities, mobile support, and performance. Find the best self-hosted Google Photos alternative.
